subject: [OOM] Disable VID
commit_message:
[OOM] Disable VID

VID is unmaintained and shouldn't be installed by default

Issue-ID: OOM-2921
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I47d0ba365838f4673c9997648f6a066c217d66f1
